name: Scanner PoC for CVE-2019-0708 RDP RCE Vuln
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Adam Bradbury (idea)
SIGMA Title: Scanner PoC for CVE-2019-0708 RDP RCE Vuln
SIGMA Description: Detects the use of a scanner by zerosum0x0 that discovers targets vulnerable to  CVE-2019-0708 RDP RCE aka BlueKeep

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4625 AND "Target Username"='AAAAAAA' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Scanner PoC for CVE-2019-0708 RDP RCE Vuln on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4625 AND "Target Username"='AAAAAAA' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Scanner PoC for CVE-2019-0708 RDP RCE Vuln
